group.name: StageKit
group.description: Cues that mimic the original Stage Kit, but mapped to a DMX light array

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Solid green on all front/back lights

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Solid green on all front/back lights

cues.name: Flare Fast
cues.description: Solid blue additive on all front/back lights

cues.name: Flare Slow
cues.description: Solid white on all front/back lights

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Blue sweep across front/back lights, 2000ms

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: 2x blue CW, 1x green CCW on beat

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
The Cue Started event only fires once 
when the cue is first triggered.

This is good for initializing any variables you will need.
notes.title: Cue Started Fires Once

notes.label: Notes
notes.note:
Cue Called fires repeatedly while a cue is active. 

If the cue is already running the second call 
will get queued and run when the first ends.
notes.title: Cue Called Fires Repeatedly

cues.name: Cool Manual
cues.description: 2x blue CW, 1x green CCW on keyframe

cues.name: Warm Automatic
cues.description: 2x red CW, 1x yellow CCW on beat

cues.name: Warm Manual
cues.description: 2x red CW, 1x yellow CCW on keyframe

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: Large: yellow+red CW; Small: cyan CW

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: CCW yellow; 8+ lights also CCW red offset 1

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Yellow CW opposite pairs, blue CCW individual

cues.name: Strobe Slow
cues.description: Strobe white at BPM/8, 70ms hold

cues.name: Strobe Medium
cues.description: Strobe white at BPM/16, 60ms hold

cues.name: Strobe Fast
cues.description: Strobe white at BPM/32, 50ms hold

cues.name: Strobe Fastest
cues.description: Strobe white at BPM/64, 40ms hold

cues.name: Default
cues.description: Blue/red alternate on keyframe; small venue: yellow flash OFF on drum-red

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: Color cycle: large red/blue/yellow, small red/green/blue; 25% beat delay

cues.name: Stomp
cues.description: Five groups toggle on keyframe: front q1 yellow, front q4 red, back q1 red, back q4 yellow, inner green

cues.name: Silhouettes Spotlight
cues.description: After Intro: blue flash on drum-red. After Dischord: solid green. Else: dark

cues.name: Dischord
cues.description: Yellow CW on beat, green dual-mode or CCW on measure, blue alternating patterns on keyframe, red flash on drum-red

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: Large: red diagonal sweep. Small: yellow diagonal + blue forward + green reverse rotations on beat
